name: FLOW_08_CLOSING_PROCESS
description: Guides lead through purchase closing timeline and requirements

nodes.content:
📋 Purchase Process Overview (30 days typically):

STEP 1: Initial Inquiry ✅ (You are here)
STEP 2: Investment Review (3-5 days)
STEP 3: Site Visit (optional, recommended)
STEP 4: Due Diligence (5-7 days)
STEP 5: Financing Application (if needed)
STEP 6: Legal Review & Contract (5-7 days)
STEP 7: Payment & Closing (1-2 days)

Total: 3-4 weeks. Let's start!

📝 Documents We Need:

1. Passport / ID (copy)
2. Proof of funds (bank statement)
3. Tax returns (last 2 years)
4. Employment letter (if applicable)
5. BDO financing app (if using loan)
6. POA (if purchasing via agent)

We provide templates. Easy process.

🔍 Due Diligence Phase (What we show you):

✓ Property title (clear, no liens)
✓ Airbnb earnings history (2 years)
✓ Tax records (all paid)
✓ Maintenance logs (property condition)
✓ Guest reviews (proof of quality)
✓ Insurance policies
✓ Management contracts
✓ Bank reconciliations

Full transparency. Everything available.

💰 Payment Schedule:

Option A (Direct):
• Down payment: PHP 8.4M (30%)
• At closing: PHP 19.6M (70%)
• Via bank transfer (secure, all documented)

Option B (Financed):
• Down payment: PHP 8.4M
• Loan: PHP 19.6M (BDO handles)
• Monthly: ~PHP 154K (from rental income)

Option C (Installment):
• 30% (PHP 8.4M) at signing
• 70% over 12 months
• Interest: 2% (negotiable)

Which works best?

✅ Closing Day (Final Step):

• All paperwork signed
• Notary witnessed (Philippines requirement)
• Funds transferred
• Certificate of ownership issued
• Income starts next month
• Property in YOUR name

Done. You're now owner.
